content_en: Abu al-Mu�affar as-Sam'aani said, lbn I:Iajar al-'Asqalaani narrated: "The way to understand this matter is to stop at what has been said in the Quran and Sunnah, without referring to analogy and reason. Whoever is not contented to stop at this point will be misled and lost in a sea of confusion, and will not find anything to put his mind at rest, because qadar is one of the secrets of Allah which is known only to the All-Knowing, All-Aware. He has put a veil around it and has concealed it from the minds and knowledge of His creation, for reasons that are known only unto Him, so it is not known by any Prophet who was sent or by any angel who is close to Allah . " 1 At-Tal;iaawi (may Allah have mercy on him) said: "The qadar is a secret of Allah concerning His creation. No angel who is close to Allah or Prophet and Messenger has any knowledge of it. Delving into the matter in depth means that one will be forsaken by Allah and lost in confusion, deprivation and transgression. So beware of examining it and thinking about it, and (exposing oneself to) insinuating whispers. Allah, the All-High, has withheld knowledge of qadar from His creation, and has forbidden them to seek to understand it. Allah (�), says: ,.( � /. t:::. \-:� �-;.·>, '] � "'\ � '-.:...) • "': l.e"' � 1' �He cannot be questioned as to what He does, while they 1 Fat}J al-Baari, 1 1 /499. See also Sharl; Al-Nawawi 'ala Muslim, 1 6/ 1 96. will be questioned) (Qur 'an 2 1 : 23) . " 2 Al-Aajurri said: "It is not proper for the Muslims to enquire in depth into the matter of qadar, because qadar is one of the secrets of Allah, and it is obligatory to believe in all the decrees of Allah, good and evil alike. Moreover, there is no guarantee that a person's inquiries into the matter of qadar will not cause him to reject the decrees of Allah concerning His slaves, and thus be misguided from the path of truth. "3 Imam Al)mad (may Allah have mercy on him) said: "It is a part of the well-known Sunnah to believe in qadar, both good and evil, to accept the a�aadeeth on this topic and to believe in them, and not to ask why or how. The correct way is to accept it and believe in it. If a person does not know the explanation of a hadith or understand it in a rational sense, he does not have to; but he still has to believe it and accept it, like the a�aadeeth of the Prophet (�) and other reports about qadar. " 4 'Ali ibn al-Madeeni said something similar to what Imam Al)mad said about qadar. 5 Some Important Principles About Qadar What the scholars have said about qadar (predestination) sets out a number of principles which are of the utmost importance: 1 . It is obligatory (waajib) to believe in qadar.
title_id: Bab: Batas-Batas Analisis Rasional tentang Qadar
content_id:
Abul-Muzhaffar As-Sam'ani berkata — dan Ibnu Hajar Al-Asqalani meriwayatkannya: "Cara memahami masalah ini adalah dengan berhenti pada apa yang telah disebutkan dalam Al-Qur'an dan Sunnah, tanpa merujuk kepada analogi dan akal. Barangsiapa tidak puas untuk berhenti di titik ini, ia akan tersesat dan tenggelam dalam lautan kebingungan, dan tidak akan mendapati apapun yang bisa menenangkan pikirannya, karena qadar adalah salah satu rahasia Allah yang tersembunyi."

Ini adalah metodologi Ahl as-Sunnah wal-Jama'ah dalam menghadapi masalah-masalah akidah yang sulit: tawqif — berhenti di batas yang telah ditetapkan oleh wahyu, tanpa melangkah lebih jauh ke dalam spekulasi yang tidak berdasar.

Beberapa prinsip penting yang Ahl as-Sunnah tetapkan tentang qadar:

1. Qadar adalah dari pengetahuan Allah yang tersembunyi — tidak ada yang mengetahuinya kecuali apa yang Allah beritahukan melalui wahyu.

2. Kewajiban seorang Muslim adalah beriman kepada qadar secara keseluruhan, tanpa perlu memahami semua hikmah dan rahasianya.

3. Menggunakan qadar sebagai dalih untuk meninggalkan amal adalah pemahaman yang salah dan bertentangan dengan syariat.

4. Allah menciptakan manusia dengan kehendak, kemampuan, dan pilihan — dan atas dasar itulah mereka dihisab di akhirat.

5. Kehendak manusia tidak bertentangan dengan kehendak Allah — keduanya benar secara bersamaan, meskipun cara penggabungannya melampaui kemampuan akal manusia untuk memahaminya sepenuhnya.
content_ar: Abu al-Mu�affar as-Sam'aani said, lbn I:Iajar al-'Asqalaani narrated: "The الطريق لفهم this matter is to stop at what has been said in the القرآن الكريم and السنة, without referring to analogy and العقل. Whoever is not contented to stop at this point will be misled and lost in a sea of confusion, and will not find anything to put his العقل at rest, لأن القدر is one of the secrets of الله which is known only to the All-Knowing, All-Aware. He has put a veil around it and has concealed it from the minds and العلم of His creation, for reasons that are known only unto Him, لذا it is not known by any النبي who was sent or by any angel who is close to الله . " 1 At-Tal;iaawi (may الله have الرحمة on him) said: "The القدر is a secret of الله فيما يتعلق بـ His creation. No angel who is close to الله or النبي and Messenger has any العلم of it. Delving into the matter in depth means that one will be forsaken by الله and lost in confusion, deprivation and transgression. لذا beware of examining it and thinking about it, and (exposing oneself to) insinuating whispers. الله, the All-High, has withheld العلم of القدر from His creation, and hأماbidden them to seek لفهم it. الله (�), says: ,.( � /. t:::. \-:� �-;.·>, '] � "'\ � '-.:...) • "': l.e"' � 1' �He cannot be questioned as to what He does, بينما they 1 Fat}J al-Baari, 1 1 /499. See أيضاً Sharl; النووي 'ala مسلم, 1 6/ 1 96. will be questioned) (Qur 'an 2 1 : 23) . " 2 Al-Aajurri said: "It is not proper for the المسلمون to enquire in depth into the matter of القدر, لأن القدر is one of the secrets of الله, and يجب to believe in all the decrees of الله, الخير and الشر alike. فضلاً عن ذلك, there is no guarantee that a person's inquiries into the matter of القدر will not cause him to reject the decrees of الله فيما يتعلق بـ His slaves, and وهكذا be misguided from the الطريق of الحق. "3 الإمام Al)mad (may الله have الرحمة on him) said: "It is a part of the well-known السنة to believe in القدر, both الخير and الشر, to accept the a�aadeeth on this topic and to believe in them, and not to ask why or how. The correct الطريق is to accept it and believe in it. إذا a person does not know the explanation of a الحديث or understand it in a rational sense, he does not have to; but he still has to believe it and accept it, like the a�aadeeth of النبي ﷺ (�) and other reports about القدر. " 4 'علي ibn al-Madeeni said something similar to what الإمام Al)mad said about القدر. 5 Some المهم Principles About القدر What the العلماء have said about القدر (القضاء والقدر) sets out a number of principles which are of the utmost importance: 1 . يجب (waajib) to believe in القدر.
